song_name: Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart

Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Ok this is my first tab, but I think I've got the song worked out!!! :P

Its just G,A,D through the whole thing!! :P  

Capo 3


[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Even if you were a million miles away[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch] 
I could still feel you in my head[/tab]

Near me, touch me, feel me.
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
And even at the bottom of the sea,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
I could still hear inside my head.[/tab]

Telling me, touch me, feel me.
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
And all the time, you were telling me lies.[/tab]
 
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
So tonight, I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna hold on to the times we had tonight[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna find a way to make it without you [/tab]

[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Have you ever tried sleeping with a broken heart? [/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Well, you could try sleeping in my bed [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Lonely, on me, nobody ever shut (?) it down like you [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
You want a crown [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
You made my body feel heaven bound [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
Why don't you hold me [/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Near me, I thought you told me [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
You'd never leave me [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Looking in the sky I could see your face[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
And I know right where I fit in [/tab]

Take me, make me, you know that I'll always be in love 
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
With you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Right til the end OOh[/tab]
 
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
So tonight, I'm gonna find a way to make it without you [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna hold on to the times that we had tonight [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you [/tab]

[tab]                  [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
Anybody could've told you right from the start [/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
It's bound (?) to fall apart[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]A[/ch]
So rather than hold on to a broken dream [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
We'll just hold on to love [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
And I could find a way to make it [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Don't hold on too tight [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I'll make it without you tonight[/tab]
 
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
So tonight, I'm gonna find a way to make it without you [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I'm gonna hold on to the times that we had tonight[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
